title: WiFi station mode and net_mgmt event handler in main.c for Heltec V3
close_reason: Added WiFi station connect logic using Kconfig SSID/PSK + fixed net_mgmt handler with proper event handling, prefix extraction, and RPL integration for Heltec V3 6LBR. Updated Kconfig, board conf, and main.c. Build verified via west. Matches sl32.2 intent.
